/usr/bin/ar qc libzchlog.a  CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/src/AsynLopper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/src/Formatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/src/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/src/LogConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/src/LogSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/jsoncpp/src/lib_json/json_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/jsoncpp/src/lib_json/json_value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zchlog.dir/jsoncpp/src/lib_json/json_writer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libzchlog.a
